title: Notification when New Group is created
excerpt: I would find it useful to have a notification that a new group on a board has been created. We have an external user who imports a spreadsheet into a board. I tried the new item notification and got bombarded with 86 ema…

posts.author: PhillAllen (Phill Allen)
posts.cookedHtml:
I would find it useful to have a notification that a new group on a board has been created. We have an external user who imports a spreadsheet into a board. I tried the new item notification and got bombarded with 86 emails because there were 86 lines on the spreadsheet
A single notification for the group creation would be sufficient.

posts.author: mightywink (Alicia Reed)
posts.cookedHtml: This is my EXACT issue. We’re an insurance company and we upload our renewal lists for processing, and I’d like automatically notify the processor when a new list has been loaded. When I set automation to notify her, she got an email for EVERY SINGLE INSURED on the list. I have to go back to just emailing her myself, but the whole point of Monday is to try to avoid having to remember to do that.
